description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with test and build stages using the python:latest Docker image globally. Add a build job in the build stage that runs on python:$VERSION for versions 3.9, 3.11, and 3.13, caches pip files in .cache/pip, executes python -m venv venv, source venv/bin/activate, pip install build, python3 -m build -s -w, pip install dist/*.whl, pip install twine, and twine check dist/*, then stores the resulting dist/*.* as a one‑week artifact; it runs on pushes that change source files or on schedule. Add a tests job in the test stage that runs on python:$VERSION for versions 3.6 through 3.13, inherits the same pip cache, runs python -m venv venv, source venv/bin/activate, pip install pytest-cov, and py.test -q --cov=musicpd test.py, and triggers on changes to musicpd.py or test.py or on schedule. Add a build_doc job in the build stage using python:latest that installs sphinx and sphinx_rtd_theme then runs sphinx-build doc/source -b html ./html -D html_theme=sphinx_rtd_theme -E -W -n --keep-going, triggered on pushes that modify doc/source/* or on schedule. Add a pages job in the build stage that runs only on the master branch, installs sphinx and sphinx_rtd_theme, builds HTML into public with sphinx-build -d ./build/doctrees doc/source -b html ./public -D html_theme=sphinx_rtd_theme, and publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. Add a tag_release job in the build stage that runs on tag pushes, uses the pip cache, creates a virtual environment, installs build, runs python3 -m build -s -w, and uploads the dist/*.* files as a named artifact $CI_PROJECT_NAME-$CI_COMMIT_TAG.
